creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
Close this PR.  MI has independently ported this.  Although his port 
incorrectly installs the plugin (in a directory where it will NOT be 
detected and is therefore USELESS), it should be used.  I would 
recommend that MI add a www/mozilla dependency into the WITH_X11 case 
and install the plugin in the mozilla plugin directory.  However, he's 
free to blow me off.   :)

--
jmc
